name: Aufträge Test2
query:
SELECT 
    si.name AS `Rechnung Nummer`,
    si.grand_total AS `Rechnungsbetrag`,
    (si.grand_total - IFNULL(
        (SELECT SUM(paid_amount) 
         FROM `tabPayment Entry` 
         WHERE docstatus = 1 
           AND reference_name = si.name), 0)) AS `Offener Betrag`,
    ((si.grand_total - IFNULL(
        (SELECT SUM(paid_amount) 
         FROM `tabPayment Entry` 
         WHERE docstatus = 1 
           AND reference_name = si.name), 0)) / si.grand_total) * 100 AS `Offener Betrag (%)`
FROM 
    `tabSales Invoice` si
ORDER BY 
    si.name;
report_script:
import frappe

def execute(filters=None):
    columns = [
        {"label": "Rechnung Nummer", "fieldname": "invoice_number", "fieldtype": "Data"},
        {"label": "Sales Order Nummer", "fieldname": "sales_order", "fieldtype": "Data"},
        {"label": "Rechnungsbetrag", "fieldname": "invoice_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency"},
        {"label": "Offener Betrag", "fieldname": "outstanding_amount", "fieldtype": "Currency"},
        {"label": "Offener Betrag (%)", "fieldname": "outstanding_amount_percent", "fieldtype": "Percent"}
    ]

    # SQL-Abfrage zur Ermittlung der Verkaufsrechnungen und zugehörigen Verkaufsaufträge
    query = """
        SELECT 
            si.name AS invoice_number,
            si_item.sales_order AS sales_order,
            SUM(si.grand_total) AS invoice_amount,
            SUM(CASE WHEN si.status NOT IN ('Abgesagt', 'Geschlossen', 'Abgeschlossen') THEN si.grand_total ELSE 0 END) AS outstanding_amount,
            (SUM(CASE WHEN si.status NOT IN ('Abgesagt', 'Geschlossen', 'Abgeschlossen') THEN si.grand_total ELSE 0 END) / SUM(si.grand_total)) * 100 AS outstanding_amount_percent
        FROM 
            `tabSales Invoice` si
        LEFT JOIN 
            `tabSales Invoice Item` si_item ON si.name = si_item.parent
        GROUP BY 
            si_item.sales_order
        ORDER BY 
            si_item.sales_order
    """

    # Abfrage ausführen
    data = frappe.db.sql(query, as_dict=True)

    # Ergebnis zurückgeben
    return columns, data
